textByHash.2d5347ecacb6bf1fd8e4a09adb963414e407687d: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?
textByHash.4b1005acb69eda45d40632107248c1c13c35ae68: That Unferth! Honestly, I have been to see him more times than my Mother's hair has fallen out!
textByHash.a675f897e5dc737a323992d970e751429c5e80b9: It's quite simple. Unferth is what we call a hypochondriac; he isn't ill but he thinks he is. All you need to do is convince him you are a Doctor or a Nurse and give him a potion to make him 'better'.
textByHash.345ea72c7af9f63864a99e1ce62bd305e597296d: Easy, make sure you are dressed in white robes and take one of these hats to wear.
textByHash.000cf3edd6e149fb61e341dacd5ac9671cdda42f: Then all you need to do is give him a vial of water and he'll take it thinking it's a cure potion.
textByHash.b2bcab51863e6925096347ff2cd6efd371eb9f9d: Have you been to 'cure' Unferth by dressing up in white robes, wearing the hat and giving him a vial of water?
textByHash.cc2b1df63110431c6193d385a812276141d94819: No problem, I get plenty of these from Gielinor Hospital Supplies.
textByHash.8309ed627647472df88e726f3d7adfaf66951092: Aha! Don't tell me... You want a potion of sealegs?
textByHash.c672e55c9a053b6833b3b297336aefeca7d94e6c: You'd be amazed at the nonsense these pirates believe! I'll let you in on a little secret, there is no magical potion to save you from the sea's wrath!
textByHash.83d2ac8c1a40722d32a304117d5b53ba872b7db7: A simple herbal remedy containing vodka. Lots of vodka.
textByHash.c17e698a796209833a80255f2e8495a8a03ca5f0: Look, if you bring me the ingredients, I'll make you the potion. It's not going to save your crew from sea curses, of course, but it'll certainly put their fears to rest!
textByHash.549af7110ac1e936b666450cb5c3e4acc4246d6a: Two bottles of vodka and an unfinished marrentill potion, I already have everything else I require.
textByHash.9c9851e7c6eaa9ecb8a7dadc49183f5026893094: Do you have the ingredients for the potion?
textByHash.2c0b19ae6e5cff7c6de3ae4588c3aad391334784: You need to bring me 2 bottles of vodka and an unfinished marrentill potion.
textByHash.ecebd9aebbf7e8b23000e1b4cb8b32b0f2e2740a: Excellent. Hand them over and I'll mix the potion.
textByHash.de2f361d763e6b3e1f06d5ede2f6d37cafa8f963: Lucky for you I made extra, try to be more careful this time!
textByHash.146a7bbd66ebfec8b290a26fb9722f4ab369be8e: I suppose he'd need a smaller dose than Juliet did, yes. She's a healthy young woman in the prime of her life, while he's been around for decades.
textByHash.3c073e2942dfccc6b195e2e2bc14f49aef0053a4: Well, I'm sure you remember the drill. I'll supply the wing of rat, tail of frog, ear of snake and horn of dog... and you need to bring me some Cadava berries.
textByHash.5420c4970671e706944086592c76f23067d605ed: That's very clever. I hope you've got a real feeling of pride and satisfaction from that.
textByHash.f62cb70f43a700485e7ae65ae5d8360848c6afe1: There you do! There's your herbal tincture!
textByHash.feaa0aa85b70fc95ed515e5e77147d5550ce5176: Oh, yes, breathing salts...erm, just let me look around. I'm sure I have some around here somewhere.
textByHash.579ae0878a8d23f22fb0daa3e33c798819aeb302: Oh blimey...I've dropped the pot and smashed it!
textByHash.4eae1b5578f7f230e3e1d359a45d74f0374503ef: Oh no, you don't understand. They're ruined. They're supposed to be kept in an airtight container and this was my last one.
textByHash.63ced78b8b4ce3f6445674fb51ccb18ebcd9a292: I can't order any more in until I have a new airtight container. And they were a top selling item as well.
textByHash.3dde7bb9a37d2664ba3720c26aeb492651790ae4: No, I can..I can order plenty, but they'll lose their effectiveness. I need an airtight pot to keep them in.
textByHash.8483205485b3b64d4d15b51b4b1b38b9b5b5dedc: I've no idea really, this pot was a family heirloom. I guess you'd have to get a new one made?
textByHash.3d8cd811a1fdef523b905689945ae85e792d0fbc: You could try Tassie Slipcast over at the Barbarian Village. She's a potter there and may be able to make one. But mind, it has to be air tight.
textByHash.11c79a7484ff2c6c4cbc95a311b4f8324bceea4a: I understand...they're all barbarians over there.
textByHash.ecc3b2557ca03605833b4b21c628348ba376d004: I smashed the pot which held them, remember?
textByHash.c303d6dfbad6e2d9360419472fcd771bcbf9fe2a: No problem, I'll just rustle up another one for you.
textByHash.312298d18db55d7e013cff822062d8bab207bc9d: Go and see Tassie in the Barbarian Village about making an airtight pot for me to store my breathing salts in, then you can take some for Horvik.
textByHash.5b52980d13b465778d5799a90ec7554a804e2209: Huzzah! You have an airtight pot! Wonderful! Ok, let me get some breathing salts into this thing for you!
textByHash.2ab92227b3b6d038595ed11207359731de34fe6b: That's great! Many thanks friend...here's your breathing salts!
textByHash.b10f312397340163c43de2935a0998d8333b9bad: As I said before, I'm the apothecary not the vet.
textByHash.421f12a17e470e80a42c91229db9bdb5c425f140: Of course I do! What kind of poison do you need help with?
textByHash.a5966a5ec5d545c026e13968958b13d9d7c82700: I think I can help you with that. What happened?
textByHash.6b4ba41abd7f3b56be47611ac2117f473a025b51: Not Pox! I remember when she was a kitten... hang on, I have no time for dilly dallying.
textByHash.ae0ef19555f14c5bea5c5b8f6901e7223a33e098: I know just the thing to help Pox out.
textByHash.3a1be4bf24c07734793f3db8301fc8db1abe53cf: I need a Bucket of Milk, some Ground Unicorn Horn, and a bit of Marrentill.
textByHash.a5aa72a0a4c657107cb866d1ea9d970f631d2171: Quick, get this to Jack. If I know him, he wouldn't have sent someone else to do this if Pox wasn't seriously ill.
textByHash.3295f9b210008e90113853f4b8378d06ab98b5cf: You need to get a Bucket of Milk, Ground Unicorn Horn and some Marrentill before I can create a cat anti-poison potion for you.
textByHash.df548968bd67d9c46a1963620a29d90c6b1b57bd: You need to get some Ground Unicorn Horn and Marrentill before we can proceed.
textByHash.91628809b14a5964cafbd14debf9e431a33765ce: You need to get a Bucket of Milk and some Marrentill before we can proceed.
textByHash.92eb83464cab8b8e98a16086a5230a9026f47ac0: You need to get a Bucket of Milk and some Ground Unicorn Horn before we can proceed.
textByHash.113e412bf09968acc3f6fdc290e1277b6defe885: You need to get some Ground Unicorn Horn before we can proceed.
textByHash.562728bc9bcd64f001651ab14b89d558d62ac98b: You need to get some Marrentill before we can proceed.
textByHash.e875ef6d64415baf62d9ce17d1c64ac50016f0ac: You need to get a Bucket of Milk before we can proceed.
textByHash.b035bc7b595b534c92003863a5f95c7801fa2a19: What are you hanging around here for? You've got the anti-poison, so go give it to Jack. Quickly!
textByHash.aad2f19f77cc68095bdd0bc5b339df1d2091d026: No problem! I'll need some more ingredients though.
textByHash.f8bbd33d187ba3e0ec81a08085a04553c8945ec2: Well hurry up and fetch them! Poor Pox is in serious danger. That poison she consumed was incredibly strong.
textByHash.0567b8042a445b2b07f9c409f3a05a363d532895: Cadava potion. It's pretty nasty. And hard to make.
textByHash.0f9b3efb7a85bea682fe51bcebdbeef7b9cbcaa3: Wing of rat, tail of frog. Ear of snake and horn of dog.
textByHash.1f9635006fcf39ec9ed27abbe3de3c308c5651d0: I have all that, but I need some Cadava berries.
textByHash.28d26bc3b03a5bbdf93eebcacf203608bd79aa58: You will have to find them while I get the rest ready. Bring them here when you have them. But be careful. They are nasty.
textByHash.b738c630ec17e7d5c1fd5b1fa1d203566e5a4c99: Phew! Here is what you need.
textByHash.a4a26646bf4d5d3fea993fd0726db31903d42b23: They're a nice bright pink colour, with green leaves, stalks are a pale brown colour...you can't miss them. They look pretty tasty, but I wouldn't advise eating them.
textByHash.22407b69cdebcc73eda404929db06c24704fb0ee: I think I saw some recently in the local vicinity. Oh yes, that's right! There was a little bit of commotion when some kids visited the south eastern Varrock mining pit. The trip was disrupted because some kids
textByHash.1e33b83425b1db22191d854a54dd74605ede54bf: had found some cadavaberry bushes and they started picking them. They wrapped that trip up pretty quickly!
textByHash.3e4be85f98cfb196ddeffe09be83402032d401b6: Hmm, they're generally okay, but if handled improperly they can be a bit nasty. And I certainly wouldn't advise drinking the potion!
textByHash.dc5da8f4afb1632b78b86c5d5746e018721902dc: Keep searching for those Cadavaberries. They're needed for the potion.
textByHash.e235b6e6ce7d23e3024da7ef47eb86d047516ffa: Well done. You have the berries.
textByHash.3cc3c020756085e4843c0c588e1120fda393d465: You're welcome. I hope it helps that young couple find happiness.
textByHash.9b9207d26ffb0d2cedad7093b558651674c209aa: Good, good. I hope it helps that young couple find happiness.
textByHash.134629ffd702c609a696ffd4786f9592e35807f4: Blimey... you've been out for hours! Are you ok? People were tripping over you as they walked into the shop.
textByHash.03fd6b0a41e284c12d0c09fcfce5de2391efcd13: Why yes, here are some energy potions.
textByHash.06dfed200286c072e19baee7465900f797898323: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.
textByHash.8ac2f1bb9535bc7cb1bc4e26b748b82ce4db061b: I have no plans to branch out into cat potions at the moment, but if there was sufficient demand for them I might change my mind.
textByHash.292aeb4cb1d4c8254c67dce68f3c9a48fcf7d54c: Well I hear young Romeo's having a little woman trouble but other than that all's quiet on the eastern front. Can I do something for you?
textByHash.0c68482329c5f913da6c3f580031c1190fe2dc01: Sad about that affair with young Romeo and Juliet...
textByHash.3a36aa155dd0f4ea9c0b3da6b514fa4530742334: I hear every time Romeo sees Juliet now he runs away screaming something about ghosts and Juliet's cousin?
textByHash.e4f5f0aa771d3813cc94080e31f00b114b13c1ed: Always did think he was a bit of a strange one...
textByHash.c41fede605545ab38448f3f314b3a0f486961bb4: Anyway! Life goes on and so does business! Can I do something for you?
textByHash.d3c0834fdf347d6fea7c079d5e9b1414da8730ca: I do indeed. I gave it to my mother. That's why I now live alone.
textByHash.9b75f8ea1551dd677e6931bdab3e764892f00036: But can I do something for you?
textByHash.26824d94a9d9586766e572a6803c7774442ea5b3: Sorry, charity is not my strong point. Do you need anything else?
textByHash.c841901b20eb7715a51200c417d421e77c3f2556: Do you want to trade the diary yet? I'd like to pass the information on to the scientific community in Varrock.
textByHash.debbb1a12ee71f6d0e47cb0777bdc940ab248688: Ok, that's all I can teach you. Many thanks for the diary.
textByHash.fae126feec3f5765fa945ac23e3f4d98abf1744b: Oh, that's a shame... Come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.a86201911e975b6691b575700f5bea41851a9f8a: Hmm, this is an interesting tome... But you've already sold me one, thanks!
textByHash.ee0a1e96fe82c19fe315f67e1ef2f2c4860cfd2f: I don't need those any more.
textByHash.5c5b81b3f450fae8598f823fa73725e1669931db: Very well done. This is for you.
